requirements.task_name: Add the highest-rated ergonomic office chair under $250 to the cart
requirements.task_description: Filter ergonomic office chairs under $250 with 4+ stars, sort by rating high-to-low and add the highest-rated black chair with quantity 1 to the cart.

required_variables.set_condition: On each call where the office chair category listing is requested (i.e., category_code corresponds to the office chairs category), store the filters and sort_by arguments that are passed to getCategoryProducts. This will naturally capture calls where chair_type is 'ergonomic', max_price is set to 250, min_rating is set to 4, and sort_by is 'rating_high_to_low'.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that the user loaded the office chairs list with the correct ergonomic/price/rating filters and the correct rating-high-to-low sort, not just that they eventually picked a correct product.

requirements.task_name: Request a quote for the cheapest color laser printer with duplex and Wi-Fi under $400
requirements.task_description: Search for color laser printers, filter to laser + color + duplex + Wi-Fi under $400, sort by price low-to-high, pick the cheapest result and submit a quote request for quantity 3.

required_variables.set_condition: On each call to searchProducts, store the query, filters, and sort_by arguments. For Task 2 evaluation, the important case is when the query is 'color laser printer' (case-insensitive) and filters/sort reflect max_price=400, printer_technology='laser', is_color_printing=true, has_duplex_printing=true, has_wifi_connectivity=true, and sort_by='price_low_to_high'.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user actually searched for the correct phrase and applied all required feature/price filters and the correct price-low-to-high sort, in addition to picking the correct cheapest product (which is validated via products + quote_requests).

requirements.task_name: Create a cart with exactly 3 different A4 paper products, each priced between $5 and $20
requirements.task_description: Filter to A4 paper between $5 and $20, sort by price low-to-high, then add the first three distinct products with quantity 4 each so the cart contains exactly 3 different A4 paper items.

required_variables.set_condition: On each call where the paper/media category listing is requested (i.e., category_code corresponds to the 'Paper & Media' section), store the filters and sort_by arguments, especially when filters.paper_size is set (e.g., 'A4') and min_price/max_price are provided.
required_variables.reason: Enables the evaluator to confirm that the user applied the A4 size filter, set min_price=5 and max_price=20, and used the 'price_low_to_high' sort, not just that the resulting cart happens to contain valid A4 products.

requirements.task_name: Save a docking station compatible with 'ProBook 450' to the saved items list
requirements.task_description: Search for docking stations, filter by compatibility with 'ProBook 450', pick the first compatible docking station in black, and add it to saved items.

required_variables.set_condition: On each call to searchProducts, store the query, filters, and sort_by arguments. For Task 4, the key case is when the query targets docking stations/ProBook 450 and filters.compatible_with_model is set to 'ProBook 450'.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to verify that the user actually used a search and compatibility filter targeting 'ProBook 450', not just that they eventually saved a compatible docking station.

requirements.task_name: Compare 27-inch monitors under $350 and add the one with the highest resolution (quantity 2) to the cart
requirements.task_description: Filter monitors to 27-inch models under $350, select the first two for comparison, choose the higher resolution monitor in the comparison view, and add 2 units with standard shipping to the cart.

required_variables.set_condition: On each call where the monitors category listing is requested (i.e., category_code corresponds to the monitors category), store the filters and sort_by arguments, in particular when filters.screen_size_inches is 27 and filters.max_price is set (e.g., 350).
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the user filtered to 27-inch monitors under $350 (and any expected sort) before choosing items for comparison, rather than relying only on the fact that the final compared products and chosen monitor were valid.

requirements.task_name: Add two different eco-certified cleaning products with free shipping and 4+ stars to the cart
requirements.task_description: Open cleaning supplies, filter to eco-certified products with free shipping and at least 4-star ratings, sort by rating high-to-low, then add the first and second products with quantities 3 and 2 respectively.

required_variables.set_condition: On each call where the cleaning supplies category listing is requested (i.e., category_code corresponds to the cleaning supplies category), store the filters and sort_by arguments, especially when filters.is_eco_certified, filters.has_free_shipping, and filters.min_rating are set.
required_variables.reason: Enables the evaluator to verify that the user applied the eco-certification, free-shipping, and minimum rating filters and the rating-high-to-low sort, in addition to ending up with appropriate items in the cart.

requirements.task_name: Use quick order by SKU to add 50 units of a network switch and proceed to the order summary
requirements.task_description: Use the quick order by SKU feature to add 50 units of SKU 'SW-1000' to the cart, then go through checkout until the order summary page with invoice payment selected.

required_variables.set_condition: After addQuickOrderItemsToCart processes the entries and returns success=true (at least one item was added to the cart), set this flag to true. This should not be reset back to false elsewhere.
required_variables.reason: Provides a non-invasive, explicit signal that the Quick Order feature (rather than the standard product detail flow) was used to add items to the cart, which cannot be inferred from the existing cart/cart_items data alone.

required_variables.set_condition: After continueToOrderSummary successfully returns with success=true (i.e., an order_summary object is produced for the active checkout session), set this flag to true. Do not reset it to false.
required_variables.reason: Records that the user actually invoked the transition to the order summary view, which is not otherwise persisted (continueToOrderSummary only returns a computed summary without updating stored state). This allows verifying that the user reached the order summary page with invoice payment selected, instead of only inferring that it would be available.

requirements.task_name: Schedule a demo for the 'Enterprise Analytics Suite' for a specific date and time
requirements.task_description: Open the 'Enterprise Analytics Suite' product, use its demo request form to schedule a demo on April 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM for 5 attendees.
